seoTitle: Davoren Park vs Dawesley — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Davoren Park and Dawesley. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Davoren Park vs Dawesley: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Davoren Park and Dawesley.
heading: Davoren Park vs Dawesley — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Davoren Park, South Australia and Dawesley, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Dawesley has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Davoren Park (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Davoren Park or Dawesley safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Davoren Park has a flood risk score of 30/100, while Dawesley scores 41/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Davoren Park scores 58/100 for bushfire risk. Dawesley scores 17/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Davoren Park or Dawesley?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Dawesley has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.15% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
